subject: docs: correct HeaderFilters comment + log a11y follow-ups
body:
- Comment in HeaderFilters claimed a focus-bounce scenario that can't
  actually happen: the modal backdrop covers both filter buttons while
  a dropdown is open, so fuel↔radius always transitions through the
  closed state. Fixed the comment.
- Three follow-ups logged in docs/TODO.md: thread search button ref
  through SearchModalProvider for complete focus-return, add
  arrow-key navigation to HeaderFilters dropdowns (mirror BurgerMenu),
  and add dialog semantics + aria-controls to the search modal.

Tags: a11y, docs, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: a11y-polish
